itinerary.title: Puri Konark Special Divine Spiritual Coastlines
itinerary.overview:
PURI KONARK SPECIAL • THE DIVINE SPIRITUAL COASTLINES Welcome to an unforgettable soul-stirring getaway curated exclusively by TRAGUIN. Embark on the ultimate Odisha Family Tour, intricately tailored to introduce your loved ones to the breathtaking landscapes, timeless architectural marvels, and sacred sea breeze of the eastern coast. As your elite travel consultants, TRAGUIN ensures a flawless vacation enriched with handpicked hotels, seamless VIP interactions, and premium comfort. Let the scenic beauty of Puri beach and the golden grandeur of Konark create sweet, unforgettable memories for your entire family. TRAGUIN Premium Luxury Itinerary — OD-002 1

TOUR OVERVIEW
This custom luxury holiday package is masterfully designed for families who wish to experience the sacred majesty, pristine wetlands, and artistic heritage of Odisha. Chauffeur-driven in an upscale, private AC vehicle, your journey guarantees exceptional comfort from arrival to departure. Your stay includes an executive meal plan consisting of nutritious breakfasts and gourmet multi-cuisine dinners. Every detail contains our signature TRAGUIN curated experience note, offering seamless priority darshan assistance, customized artisan interactions, and 24/7 guest support.

WHY VISIT
When exploring options for a Luxury Odisha Holiday, travelers expect a profound immersion into ancient legends, coastal beauty, and royal hospitality. The sacred city of Puri combined with the architectural genius of Konark forms the ultimate jewel of the East, making a Puri Honeymoon Package or Odisha Family Tour an extraordinary journey. From exploring iconic attractions like the Shree Jagannath Temple to admiring the stone wheels of the Sun Temple, Odisha sightseeing offers deep emotional experiences. Our comprehensive TRAGUIN Odisha Packages bring you closer to top popular Instagram locations like the serene sands of Golden Beach and the dolphin-spotting waters of Chilika Lake—the top tourist places in Odisha. Indulge in vibrant local shopping for authentic handloom sarees, taste the legendary Mahaprasad, or witness beautiful sand art right by the shore. This is the absolute best time to visit Odisha with the exceptional luxury touch of premium stays and handpicked beach resorts.

itinerary.seo_description: Premium 03 Nights / 04 Days Odisha package (OD-002 / TRG-ODI-002): Bhubaneswar • Puri • Konark • Chilika Lake (Satapada) with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN BHUBANESWAR TO PURI — THE TEMPLE CITY TO THE DIVINE COASTLINE – WELCOME EXPERIENCE
Day 02: SACRED PURI & CHILIKA LAKE EXCURSION — DIVINE BLESSINGS & THE BREATHTAKING DOLPHIN LAGOON
Day 03: THE KONARK SUN TEMPLE EXCURSION — THE BLACK PAGODA – A MONUMENT OF RITUALISTIC CHRONOMETRY
Day 04: PURI TO BHUBANESWAR & DEPARTURE — HERITAGE CAVES TO RETURN JOURNEY – UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private, hassle-free entry escort inside the holy Shree Jagannath Temple with trusted, verified pandas.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Smoothly timed morning drives along the Marine Drive to capture sunrise lighting perfectly for photography.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: Accommodations chosen strictly based on pristine cleanliness, luxury sea views, and family-friendly amenities.
Luxury Transportation: High-end luxury vehicles operated by polite, background-checked, and safety- conscious coastal chauffeurs.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN BHUBANESWAR TO PURI — THE TEMPLE CITY TO THE DIVINE COASTLINE – WELCOME EXPERIENCE
days.description: Your premium Odisha experience begins with a grand reception at Bhubaneswar Airport or Railway Station by your private luxury transport chauffeur. Embark on a highly scenic road route to Puri. En-route, visit the mesmerizing Dhauli Shanti Stupa, the famous edict rock site of Emperor Ashoka. Witness the incredible artisan heritage village of Raghurajpur, globally renowned for Pattachitra scroll paintings. Arrive in Puri and check into your premium handpicked hotel overlooking the ocean.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Dhauli Peace Pagoda, Raghurajpur Heritage Craft Village, Puri Golden Beach.
Evening Experience:  Relaxed stroll on the private deck of Puri Beach, followed by a coastal cocktail reception.
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Handpicked Premium Beachfront Resort)

days.title: SACRED PURI & CHILIKA LAKE EXCURSION — DIVINE BLESSINGS & THE BREATHTAKING DOLPHIN LAGOON
days.description: Awake to the soothing symphony of ocean waves. Early this morning, experience a spiritually elevating private VIP Darshan at the holy Shree Jagannath Temple, an iconic attraction of worldwide renown. Return to your resort for a lavish breakfast, then drive towards Satapada, Chilika Lake—Asia's largest brackish water lagoon. Board an exclusive premium private boat cruise to spot the rare Irrawaddy Dolphins and visit the tranquil Sea Mouth where the lake merges into the Bay of Bengal.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Shree Jagannath Temple, Chilika Lake Satapada, Irrawaddy Dolphin Sanctuary, Sea
Optional Activities:  Sampling freshly caught fried prawns and crabs prepared on an isolated island camp.
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Handpicked Premium Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Seafood Dinner

days.title: THE KONARK SUN TEMPLE EXCURSION — THE BLACK PAGODA – A MONUMENT OF RITUALISTIC CHRONOMETRY
days.description: Enjoy a spectacular breakfast before taking a drive along the legendary Marine Drive toward the UNESCO World Heritage Site—the Konark Sun Temple. Built in the 13th century as a colossal chariot for the Sun God, its architectural brilliance features intricately carved stone wheels that serve as precise sundials. After exploring this breathtaking monument, spend your afternoon relaxing at the clean, quiet sands of Chandrabhaga Beach, a highly popular Instagram location.
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Konark Sun Temple, Konark Interpretation Centre, Chandrabhaga Beach, Ramachandi
Evening Experience:  VIP tickets to the spellbinding Konark Sound & Light multimedia show.
Overnight Stay:  Puri (Handpicked Premium Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included:  Premium Breakfast & Authentic Odia Royal Dinner

days.title: PURI TO BHUBANESWAR & DEPARTURE — HERITAGE CAVES TO RETURN JOURNEY – UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES
days.description: Indulge in a final morning breakfast by the sea. Check out and drive back to Bhubaneswar to explore the ancient rock-cut architecture of Udayagiri and Khandagiri Caves, dating back to the 2nd century BCE. Visit the beautiful Lingaraj Temple plaza before your private luxury vehicle smoothly escorts you to the airport or station for your homeward journey. Bid farewell to the coast while carrying unforgettable memories meticulously designed by TRAGUIN. 3
activities: Sightseeing Included:  Udayagiri & Khandagiri Caves, Lingaraj Temple area, local handloom boutiques.
Transfers Included:  Private luxury point-to-point departure drop-off.
